# Community & Collaboration Design

Pending checklist tasks are gathered here.  They primarily involve non‑source assets.

## Tasks

- Set up community collaboration channels
- Create project contribution portal
- Develop community engagement plan
- Implement project feedback collection system
- Create community guidelines and code of conduct

## Classification in `src`

These items rarely touch `src/` directly; most are executed via documentation and web infrastructure.
If an API or bot is required (e.g. for a contribution portal), code could reside under `src/community/` or `src/web/`.

## Notes

This design document exists to remind maintainers that community features are essential even though they live outside the core codebase.
